default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and discuss new strategic initiatives for Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Confirmed:** Siit will renew; the 30-day notice deadline is this Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** Recent content is performing strongly, with listicles and tool reviews gaining organic traffic and Google features.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**New Q1 Strategy:** A Q1 campaign on "app access" will use a gated whitepaper with proprietary customer data to generate leads and build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**UX Revamp:** The blog and tools pages will be redesigned for a wider layout and better UX, inspired by Healthline and Atomic Work.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Tracking

  - [**Tracking Setup:** Looker is now tracking all "Book a Demo" button clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Limitation:** GA4 logs clicks from the navbar and sticky CTA as a single event, preventing source-specific attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Performance:** Recent content is performing strongly, with listicles and tool reviews gaining significant organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Google Features:** Articles are appearing in Google's "People also ask" and "referenced by" sections, a key step toward earning direct featured snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [**Strategy Validation:** This confirms the current content strategy is effective.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)

### Q1 Content Strategy: App Access

  - [**Goal:** Create new content formats to support a Q1 campaign on "app access" (automating employee software requests).](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Past tests showed "app access" content drives high open rates.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Proposed Asset:** A gated whitepaper with proprietary customer data.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Method:** Survey Siit customers to gather unique statistics (e.g., time/money saved).](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proprietary data is a powerful differentiator against AI-generated content and builds authority.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Execution:** Matt will investigate adding whitepaper creation as a custom service.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)

### Website UX Revamp

  - [**Context:** Siit is undergoing a full site redesign (new branding, simplified structure, rewritten core pages).](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [**Blog/Tools Page Redesign:** The pages will be revamped for a wider, less condensed layout, inspired by Healthline and Atomic Work.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [**Healthline Inspiration:** Use hero section buckets for direct jumps to comparison, alternative, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
      - [**Atomic Work Inspiration:** Structure content into "chapters" for better user flow and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** Matt will reintroduce image generation to the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To improve visual appeal and break up text.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Must not create production bottlenecks as it did in the past.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**Renewal:** Siit will renew for the upcoming year.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Deadline:** 30-day notice is due this Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
      - [**Contract:** Carmel is awaiting the renewal contract from Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Production:** Paused for one week over Christmas.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Continues based on Carmel's approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**Comms:** Matt is OOO from Dec 19–Jan 2. Slack will be monitored for emergencies.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [Confirm renewal with Andy and sign the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [Provide specific design specs for the blog/tools page revamp.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
      - [Investigate adding whitepaper creation as a custom service.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
      - [Reintroduce image generation into the content workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
      - [Share inspiring website/blog examples from other GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/CE8opYsWhF2gyXwXpgJ8xfQrWLHRzEoe?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
